title: Arcana
body:
## What?
This is a *very* work-in-progress magic mod with a focus on spells, accessories/rpg mechanics, and overall "gimmicky" stuff, based on the [example mod](https://github.com/Dev0Louis/Nebula/tree/master/nebulo) for [Nebula](https://github.com/Dev0Louis/Nebula)

## How?
Currently, there is only one spell you can use. Look into [Nebulo](https://github.com/Dev0Louis/Nebula/tree/master/nebulo) for more information on it (You'll need operator permissions to run a few commands, sorry).

<details>
<summary>Steps</summary>

1. Get the spell: `/nebula learnSpell arcana:cloud_jump`
2. Get mana: `/nebula setMana @s 20`
3. Set a keybind for "key.arcana.example" and press it to use the spell
4. profit..?

</details>

## Where?
The project is licensed under the MIT License and can be found on [Github](https://github.com/tmaster-terrarian/Arcana).

## Why?
Because, I like magic and stuff, something good ole' Minceraft could use some more of.

## When?
Now. Immediately. This project is available as soon as I fix all the errors in each update !

Speaking of, this is entire mod is **very** subject to change, so be wary of that!
